category_sources: source_facts.description: Efficient rsh-like utility, for using hosts in parallel.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/chaos/pdsh; repository lookup skipped per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes parallel host command execution; source_facts.executables lists pdsh, pdcp, rpdcp, and dshbak.
